title: T-032 — UI: TEC-010 Item List page
prompt: Build /technical/items page (TEC-010, §6.5) — Item List with filters by type, status, allergens, last D365 sync. Use Server Component fetching from GET /api/technical/items (T-008). Filter chips, search input, paginated table (shadcn Table). Row click navigates to TEC-012 detail. Match prototype `materials_list_screen` lines 432-480 in design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx and `products_screen` lines 4-52 in design/Monopilot Design System/settings/data-screens.jsx. RED tests/ui/tec-010-item-list.test.tsx using Playwright + RTL parity assertions. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-010-item-list.test.tsx`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Item list page with filters, search, pagination — parity with materials_list_screen prototype.
pipeline_inputs.details: Parity checklist: 1) Top filter row order: Type | Status | Allergens | D365 Sync | Search; 2) Table columns: Code | Name | Type | Status | Allergens (chips) | Cost/kg | D365 status | Updated; 3) Empty state copy + Add button match prototype; 4) Use shadcn Table, Input, Select primitives — no <select>; 5) Action button 'Create item' top-right opens TEC-011 modal.
acceptance_criteria: Given the page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:432-480 and design/Monopilot Design System/settings/data-screens.jsx:4-52, then it shows structural parity (same filter row order, same table columns, same Create button placement), visual parity (shadcn Input/Select/Table primitives, same density tokens), and interaction parity (filter chips toggle, row click opens detail, empty-state matches) — verified by RTL snapshot + manual checklist in details.
Given filters Type=fg + Status=active are selected, when applied, then the API receives ?type=fg&status=active and table reloads.
Given empty result, when rendered, then the prototype empty-state copy and 'Create item' CTA appear.
Given user lacks technical.items.create, when page renders, then the Create button is hidden.
test_strategy: RED tests asserting prototype parity (snapshot diff + DOM checks against checklist).
risk_red_lines: Do not use raw <select> instead of shadcn Select.
Do not invent extra columns beyond prototype.
